label: requestSubmit()
summary: Programmatic submit that runs constraint validation, unlike form.submit().

label: showPicker()
summary: Summon a control's native picker UI on demand — a UA-privileged action no other API exposes.

label: Form-Associated Custom Elements
summary: static formAssociated + ElementInternals make a custom element a real form control (value, validity, lifecycle).

label: :user-valid / :user-invalid
summary: Validation pseudo-classes that match only after user interaction — the native touched/dirty state.

label: Declarative Shadow DOM
summary: <template shadowrootmode> — SSR-able shadow roots with no JS.

label: Popover API
summary: popover attribute + popovertarget — top-layer, light-dismiss, focus management with no JS.

label: CustomStateSet / :state()
summary: Expose internal element state to CSS via internals.states / :state(x) without leaking attributes.

label: CSS Anchor Positioning
summary: anchor-name / position-anchor / position-try-fallbacks — tether a popover to its trigger and auto-flip on overflow.

label: Invoker Commands
summary: command / commandfor — declare a button's effect on another element in markup.

label: field-sizing: content
summary: Auto-grow inputs/textareas to their content via CSS.

label: <dialog closedby>
summary: Declarative light-dismiss control (any / closerequest / none), unifying the dismiss vocabulary popover uses.

label: Customizable <select> (appearance: base-select)
summary: Arbitrary markup inside <option> + styleable picker while keeping native keyboard, a11y, picker, and form submission. Not polyfillable — only replaceable.

label: Cross-root ARIA / Reference Target
summary: Point aria-activedescendant across a shadow boundary. The gap lives in the a11y tree JS can't write — partial mitigation only, the one genuine blocker for shadow-encapsulated comboboxes.
